stem: A pupil is choosing data types for fields in a school records program.
model_answer: {"integer": ["Number of pupils in a class", "Year group"], "real": ["Average homework score", "Height in metres"], "boolean": ["Whether the pupil takes packed lunch"], "string": ["Pupil first name", "Postcode"]}
review_notes: Tick every field that suits each data type. Year group is integer (whole-number). Postcodes are strings because they contain letters and spaces.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Tick every field that is best stored as each data type.

columns: Number of pupils in a class
Whether the pupil takes packed lunch
correctByRow: Number of pupils in a class
Whether the pupil takes packed lunch

mark_points.text: integer — number of pupils, year group
